description: IP2Location provides IP geolocation and related network intelligence services, including country/city lookup, ASN/ISP data, proxy signals, and bulk lookups. Its products include legacy and newer hosted APIs plus local tooling for command-line and AI-assisted workflows.
summary: IP2Location exposes multiple developer surfaces: a legacy geolocation REST API with a published OpenAPI spec, newer IP2Location.io geolocation and bulk REST APIs, a Go-installed CLI, and a local MCP server integration; all can use an IP2Location-issued API key, with some newer surfaces also supporting bearer auth or limited keyless access.
